holdings.infoBox: TRUH is an equity ETF with a total of 60 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eli Lilly and Company stock at 16.10%, Johnson & Johnson at 10.35%, AbbVie at 7.16%, UnitedHealth Group at 6.70%, and Merck & Co. at 5.28%.

overview.description: The VanEck Healthcare TruSector ETF (TRUH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation through exposure to US companies in the healthcare sector. Stock selection uses a discretionary investment process. TRUH was launched on Apr 1, 2026 and is issued by VanEck.
